event: Kuzma Minin rallying the people of Nizhny Novgorod
description: A gray-toned wash drawing depicting a crowd scene with a central bearded man in dark clothing standing on an elevated position with his right arm raised in an impassioned gesture of rallying or speechmaking. Around him, a diverse crowd of men, women, and children in various Russian costumes react with attention and emotion. Some figures carry or bring objects, possibly contributions. A church or bell tower is visible in the background. The scene conveys political urgency and civic mobilization. The technique is monochrome wash with expressive brushwork.
